---
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
      smooth_scroll: true
    css: /home/uhlemann/heekuk_path/GoWGS/scripts/styles.css
params:
  mlst_files: NULL        # 벡터
  args_full_files: NULL   # 벡터
  args_short_files: NULL  # 벡터
  plas_full_files: NULL 
  plas_short_files: NULL   # 벡터
  tetyper_json: NULL                # 단일 파일 (필수)
  mlst_master_csv: NULL
  master_csv: NULL                  # 요약 CSV 경로 (선택)
  kraken2_table: NULL               # Kraken2 contamination 요약 CSV
  kraken2_db_name: NULL             # Kraken2 DB 이름
---

# <span class="title-text">Uhlemann Lab WGS Summary Report</span>  

<div style="text-align:right; font-size:18px; font-weight:bold;">
  Analysis date: `r Sys.Date()`
</div>

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(error = TRUE)  # 오류 나도 문서 계속 생성

library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(readr)

read_srst2_safe <- function(p){
  if (!is.character(p) || length(p) != 1 || !nzchar(p) || !file.exists(p)) return(tibble())
  df <- tryCatch(
    data.table::fread(p, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, fill = TRUE, quote = "",
                      data.table = FALSE, showProgress = FALSE),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (is.null(df)) return(tibble())
  if (ncol(df) > 0) {
    keep <- colSums(!is.na(df) & df != "") > 0
    if (any(keep)) df <- df[, keep, drop = FALSE]
  }
  names(df) <- gsub("\\s+", "_", tolower(names(df)))
  if (!"gene" %in% names(df) && "allele" %in% names(df)) df$gene <- df$allele
  tibble::as_tibble(df)
}

```


***

## Master Summary table


```{r master_table, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (!is.null(params$master_csv) && file.exists(params$master_csv) && file.info(params$master_csv)$size > 0) {
  master <- read.csv(params$master_csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
} else {
  master <- data.frame(Message = "summary_master.csv not found or empty")
}
DT::datatable(master, extensions = 'Buttons',
  options = list(dom = 'frtipB', buttons = c('excel','csv'),
                 pageLength = 50, scrollX = TRUE, scrollY = "300px"))




```

<br>
<br>

***

## Kraken2 Result

Kraken2 DB: `r ifelse(is.null(params$kraken2_db_name) || !nzchar(params$kraken2_db_name), "NA", params$kraken2_db_name)`

```{r kraken2_table, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
if (!is.null(params$kraken2_table) && file.exists(params$kraken2_table) && file.info(params$kraken2_table)$size > 0) {
  krk <- read.csv(params$kraken2_table, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
} else {
  krk <- data.frame(Message = "kraken2_summary.csv not found or empty")
}
DT::datatable(krk, extensions = 'Buttons',
  options = list(dom = 'frtipB', buttons = c('excel','csv'),
                 pageLength = 50, scrollX = TRUE, scrollY = "300px"))
```

<br>
<br>

***

## MLST Result

MLST (Multi-locus sequence typing) analysis determines the sequence types of isolates based on housekeeping genes.

```{r mlst_table, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (!is.null(params$mlst_master_csv) && file.exists(params$mlst_master_csv) && file.info(params$mlst_master_csv)$size > 0) {
  master <- read.csv(params$mlst_master_csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
} else {
  master <- data.frame(Message = "summary_master.csv not found or empty")
}
DT::datatable(master, extensions = 'Buttons',
  options = list(dom = 'frtipB', buttons = c('excel','csv'),
                 pageLength = 50, scrollX = TRUE, scrollY = "300px"))

```

<br>
<br>

***

## Antimicrobial Resistance Genes – Short Summary

This table shows the **summary-level SRST2 results**, reporting only gene-level matches for antimicrobial resistance.

```{r args_table, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
path <- if (is.character(params$args_short_files) && length(params$args_short_files) >= 1) {
  params$args_short_files[[1]]
} else {
  ""
}

args_tbl <- read_srst2_safe(path)

if (nrow(args_tbl) == 0) {
  cat("No ARG entries found (file missing or unreadable).")
} else {
  DT::datatable(
    args_tbl,
    extensions = "Buttons",
    options = list(
      dom = "frtipB",
      buttons = c("excel","csv"),
      pageLength = 50,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      scrollY = "300px"
    )
  )
}
```

<br>
<br>

***

## Antimicrobial Resistance Genes – Full Matches

This table contains **detailed SRST2 output**, including full gene matches, alleles, and associated metrics.

```{r args_full_table, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

path <- if (is.character(params$args_full_files) && length(params$args_full_files) >= 1) {
  params$args_full_files[[1]]
} else {
  ""
}

args_tbl <- read_srst2_safe(path)

if (nrow(args_tbl) == 0) {
  cat("No ARG entries found (file missing or unreadable).")
} else {
  DT::datatable(
    args_tbl,
    extensions = "Buttons",
    options = list(
      dom = "frtipB",
      buttons = c("excel","csv"),
      pageLength = 50,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      scrollY = "300px"
    )
  )
}


```

<br>
<br>

***


## Plasmid Genes Detected – Short Summary

Plasmid replicons and associated genes identified by SRST2 against plasmid database.

```{r plas_short_table, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

path <- if (is.character(params$plas_short_files) && length(params$plas_short_files) >= 1) {
  params$plas_short_files[[1]]
} else {
  ""
}

args_tbl <- read_srst2_safe(path)

if (nrow(args_tbl) == 0) {
  cat("No ARG entries found (file missing or unreadable).")
} else {
  DT::datatable(
    args_tbl,
    extensions = "Buttons",
    options = list(
      dom = "frtipB",
      buttons = c("excel","csv"),
      pageLength = 50,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      scrollY = "300px"
    )
  )
}

```


<br>
<br>

***

## Plasmid Genes Detected - Full Matches

Plasmid replicons and associated genes identified by SRST2 against plasmid database.

```{r plas_table, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

path <- if (is.character(params$plas_full_files) && length(params$plas_full_files) >= 1) {
  params$plas_full_files[[1]]
} else {
  ""
}

args_tbl <- read_srst2_safe(path)

if (nrow(args_tbl) == 0) {
  cat("No ARG entries found (file missing or unreadable).")
} else {
  DT::datatable(
    args_tbl,
    extensions = "Buttons",
    options = list(
      dom = "frtipB",
      buttons = c("excel","csv"),
      pageLength = 50,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      scrollY = "300px"
    )
  )
}

```

<br>
<br>

***

```{r tetyper_flag, include=FALSE}
has_tetyper <- FALSE
valid_idx <- NULL
path <- params$tetyper_json

is_good <- function(v) {
  v <- trimws(as.character(v))
  !is.na(v) & nzchar(v) & toupper(v) != "N/A" & v != "-"
}

if (!is.null(path) && nzchar(path) && file.exists(path) && file.info(path)$size > 0) {
  x <- try(jsonlite::fromJSON(path, simplifyVector = TRUE), silent = TRUE)
  if (!inherits(x, "try-error") && !is.null(x)) {
    df <- as.data.frame(x, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
    names(df) <- trimws(gsub("\\.+"," ", names(df)))  # "Struct.Profile" -> "Struct Profile"
    # 디버그: 컬럼 목록 찍기
    message("[TETyper] columns: ", paste(colnames(df), collapse=", "))

    sp   <- if ("Struct Profile"     %in% names(df)) df[["Struct Profile"]]     else NA
    sv   <- if ("Structural Variant" %in% names(df)) df[["Structural Variant"]] else NA
    cv   <- if ("Combined Variant"   %in% names(df)) df[["Combined Variant"]]   else NA
    snpv <- if ("SNP Variant"        %in% names(df)) df[["SNP Variant"]]        else NA

    valid_idx <- is_good(sp) | is_good(sv) | is_good(cv) | is_good(snpv)
    has_tetyper <- any(valid_idx, na.rm = TRUE)

    assign("tetyper_df_internal", df, envir = .GlobalEnv)
    assign("tetyper_valid_idx_internal", valid_idx, envir = .GlobalEnv)

    message("[TETyper] has_tetyper=", has_tetyper, 
            " | any valid rows: ", ifelse(is.null(valid_idx), NA, any(valid_idx, na.rm=TRUE)))
  } else {
    message("[TETyper] JSON parse failed")
  }
} else {
  message("[TETyper] file missing or empty")
}
```


```{r tetyper_title, echo=FALSE, results='asis', eval=has_tetyper}
cat("### TETyper: KPC context (Tn4401)\n")
cat("The table below summarizes deletions, structural/SNP profiles, and flanking sequences inferred by TETyper.\n\n")
```


```{r tetyper_table, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, eval=has_tetyper}
df <- get("tetyper_df_internal", envir = .GlobalEnv)
valid_idx <- get("tetyper_valid_idx_internal", envir = .GlobalEnv)

show <- df[which(valid_idx), , drop = FALSE]

# 보기 좋은 핵심 컬럼만 우선 노출(있을 때만)
pref_cols <- c(
  "Sample", "Structural Variant", "Struct Profile",
  "SNP Variant", "SNPs (Hom)", "SNPs (Het)",
  "Combined Variant",
  "Left flanks", "Right flanks",
  "Left flank counts", "Right flank counts",
  "Deletions", "Region presence"
)
cols <- intersect(pref_cols, colnames(show))
if (length(cols) == 0) cols <- colnames(show)

DT::datatable(
  show[, cols, drop = FALSE],
  extensions = "Buttons",
  options = list(
    dom = "frtipB",
    buttons = c("excel","csv"),
    pageLength = 50,
    scrollX = TRUE,
    scrollY = "300px"
  )
)


```{r tetyper_line, echo=FALSE, results='asis', eval=has_tetyper}
cat("***")
```



```{r logo, echo=FALSE, out.width='50%', fig.align='center'}
knitr::include_graphics("/home/uhlemann/heekuk_path/GoWGS/scripts/Columbia_CUIMC_Uhlemann4.png")
```
